title: duranta repens var. ellisia
intro: Duranta repens var. ellisia, also known as skyflower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Americas, characterized by its blue, purple, or white flowers and a woody stem. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Duranta repens var. ellisia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of the world.
